close_reason: Server startup simplified: accepts sequencer, resolver_layout, optional routing_data. recover_from just unlocks. Tests pass.
description:
Simplify commit proxy server startup to accept minimal params.

## Current child_spec

Accepts transaction_system_layout and builds everything from it.

## New child_spec

```elixir
def child_spec(opts) do
  epoch = Keyword.fetch!(opts, :epoch)
  sequencer = Keyword.fetch!(opts, :sequencer)
  resolver_layout = Keyword.fetch!(opts, :resolver_layout)
  
  # Start with empty routing, will be populated via metadata
  routing_data = RoutingData.new_empty()
  
  %{
    id: __MODULE__,
    start: {__MODULE__, :start_link, [epoch, sequencer, resolver_layout, routing_data]}
  }
end
```

## Changes to server.ex

1. Update `child_spec/1` to accept minimal params
2. Update `init/1` to use empty RoutingData
3. Simplify or remove `recover_from/3`:
   - No TSL to receive
   - Just unlock and start running
   - May just need `unlock/1` that transitions locked → running
4. Update `start_link/1` signature

## Recovery Flow

Old: Director sends TSL via recover_from/3
New: Director starts proxy with params, sends system tx, metadata populates routing

## Testing

- Verify proxy starts with minimal params
- Verify routing data populates via first transaction
title: Server: Simplify startup with epoch, sequencer, resolver_layout
